purpose: Minimal forgecode shared task set without model serving.

tasks.title: Echo OK
tasks.prompt: Run a no-op process that prints OK and exits 0.

tasks.title: Working-dir isolation
tasks.prompt: Run pwd under an explicit working directory and assert the path prefix.

tasks.title: Timeout guard
tasks.prompt: Start a sleep longer than the runner timeout and assert timeout handling.

runner_notes: Semantic/SWE cases are intentionally excluded from v1; this fixture gates harness reliability only.
Set DUAL_HARNESS_WORKDIR to a writable temp dir before t2.
